text:
Piers Morgantook toTwitterto denounce the singing atSunday's Paris Olympics closing ceremony,exclaiming in no uncertain terms: "I wish to report a murder of the American national anthem."

The Star-spangled Banner was honoured by Californian R&B singer H.E.R at at the Stade de France yesterday, as part of a ceremonywhich also saw actor Tom Cruise raise the Olympic flag. However, after Piers argued that the quality of the vocals hadn't impressed, he received a flood of sympathy from viewers.

One quipped: "Your police won't answer, they are too busy arresting people for memes." Meanwhile, another gasped: "Saw it too! It almost made my ears bleed."

A third griped: "For a country that takes every opportunity it can to sing its national anthem and is supposedly immensely proud to do so, they're not shy of letting anyone absolutely murder it it at every big ceremony seen worldwide." Some were puzzled by the transformation of the song into a "soul" number, believing it was betraying its roots.

"The over the top nature of it has already put me off Los Angeles 2028!" an Olympics fan exclaimed, referring to the next city where the famous event will be held. However, not everyone agreed with Piers as some expressed proud patriotism.

READ MORE:Olympics 2024 closing ceremony slammed as fans all make London 2012 complaint



"It was fine. There’s so many people butchering it on a daily basis at MLB games, that Americans are used to it. As bad renditions go, this was hardly offensive," one viewer wrote.

Another contradicted Piers to say: "The only murder here is you killing the vibe. She did an amazing job."

Someone else argued that his tweet had shown "a lack of respect and understanding for important cultural symbols".

Meanwhile, multiple people stepped forward to suggest that nothing could live up to the performance of the anthem that Whitney Houston had put on way back in 1991.

Don't miss:BBC Breakfast's Jon Kay says 'thanks' as he bids farewell to 'emotional' co-star

Don't miss:Eagle-eyed royal fans spot Princess Kate wearing new ring on engagement finger

Don't miss:Olympics 2024’s controversial moments – from Seine sickness to booted swimmer



This isn't the only controversy than the performance of the anthem has stirred up.

Some were horrified by how Team USA players had reacted to the anthem in comparison to their semi-finals opponents in Serbia when they heard their own national anthem.

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

Photos were shared online of the American team looking down or behind them while seeming distracted - and even putting their hands in their pockets, which aroused anger.

Slamming their seeming lack of national pride, one commentator suggested their actions had been "like insulting your own mother".

title: Piers Morgan's stinging ten-word Olympics verdict as he slams LA handover | Celebrity News | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Chloe Govan
description: Piers Morgan admitted he was totally unimpressed by one aspect of the Paris Olympics' closing ceremony.
